latest.title: Llamas survive these mountains better than we do
latest.script_key: these llamas can t shiver so they run a different heater inside their feet watch how their toes get pink with blood right before they dig in that s why they can stand on ice like it s a hot sidewalk so if you ever hike up there

latest.title: Desert mountains fool your brain
latest.script_key: these mountains aren t solid rock see how the layers tilt different ways that s not erosion that s the land bending like hot taffy under its own weight the slowest force on earth isn t wind or water it s gravity pulling the crust down that s why valleys open where you least expect

latest.title: Fossils turn old bones into time clues
latest.script_key: fossils can preserve a clue from deep time watch the shape in the rock because fossils form when buried remains leave mineral records behind the original body is gone but the pattern can reveal age habitat and behavior which ancient clue should we read next

latest.title: Bats use first move before they change
latest.script_key: bats bolt in half a second when a camera clicks their sonar paints the air so they see every obstacle instantly that s why they re already gone look close every wingbeat tilts sideways not up did you learn they re blind

latest.title: Ducks carry waterproof oil on their feathers
latest.script_key: ducks reveal the waterproof feathers first watch closely because ducks spread oil from a gland near the tail that coating helps water bead away keeping the body warmer and lighter the pond looks easy because the feather coat is engineered would you test it

latest.title: Magnets make invisible fields visible
latest.script_key: magnets can show a hidden force map watch the filings line up because each tiny piece becomes a small magnet in the field together they trace the direction of the force around the magnet the pattern is physics drawing itself which force next

latest.title: desert mountains erode faster than you think
latest.script_key: these peaks disappear fast notice the jagged ridges that s because water doesn t just flow downhill it carves like a sculptor a single storm can strip away inches in hours that s why some desert ranges look like they re melting would you guess this whole mountain used to be twice as tall

latest.title: Lightning makes air explode into thunder
latest.script_key: lightning turns air into a shock wave watch the flash first because lightning heats a narrow path of air extremely fast that air expands suddenly and the pressure wave reaches us as thunder the sound is the atmosphere snapping back which storm signal next

latest.title: Coral reefs are cities built by tiny animals
latest.script_key: coral reefs are built by tiny living builders watch the reef texture because coral animals build hard skeletons that stack into habitat fish algae and countless small creatures then use that structure like a city the color sits on top of engineering which habitat next

latest.title: Bats aren't blind but their face decorations tell a real sto
latest.script_key: watch this one twice notice those leaf like nose flaps that s not decoration those flaps focus the sound bats use to hunt that s why bats with smoother faces often miss prey did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Bats hunt crickets with sound not sight
latest.script_key: bats see with their ears watch this cricket s wings blur but the bat still nails it that s echolocation sound bounces off prey faster than light that s why the bat never misses in the dark did you think bats were blind

latest.title: Snail beetles don’t move like you think
latest.script_key: this beetle rides a shell look at those back legs see how they grip the snail s foot like handles that s why it can steer the snail like a tiny tractor school books say beetles crawl but this one drives would you climb aboard

latest.title: Bangladesh's hidden volcanic crater surprise
latest.script_key: bangladesh has a volcano crater with green hills all around that s why the inside looks like a bowl of fresh salad look closer the rim isn t just dirt it s cooled lava rock tough enough to hold the forest up did you think volcanic craters were always barren watch this one twice

latest.title: Himalayan lake hides a volcanic secret
latest.script_key: this lake shouldn t exist it s perched above 17 000 feet in the himalayas where glaciers usually carve valleys not hold water that s because it s sitting inside an ancient volcanic crater not carved by ice watch the steep walls drop straight down that s the volcano talking not the glacier did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Mountains are eroding faster than they're growing
latest.script_key: those cliffs are disappearing right now see how the rock layers peel like wet paper that s not frost it s the rock actually dissolving because rain is slightly acidic that s why these peaks shrink faster than they grow did your school books say mountains last forever

latest.title: Mountains don’t stay the same forever
latest.script_key: here s the part nobody tells you those sharp mountain ridges they re already crumbling glaciers chew the rock freeze thaw splits it and wind polishes the scars that s why these slopes look so jagged did you learn in school that mountains last forever

latest.title: Fossil footprints prove dinosaurs moved fast
latest.script_key: these prints used to mean slow but i clocked the stride look each step overlaps not spaced like a slug that s why the track s from a runner not a lounger did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Desert colugo glides not flies at night
latest.script_key: they don t fly they glide using stretched skin like a flying squirrel that skin wraps from neck to tail turning them into living parachutes watch this one twice it lands without a sound what would you name this silent glider

latest.title: Beetles can steer by the Milky Way
